failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, so the agent could not obtain the catalog evidence needed to identify the cheapest available Skateboard.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan matched the user request: it attempted to search the product catalog for available Skateboards sorted by ascending price. At index 3, the required tool call was made with well-formed arguments, but the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: a catalog search dependency timeout after 30000ms. This is not a schema or invocation error, and there is no later evidence that the timeout was resolved or retried successfully.
